name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: Casada's Chief of Staff: "Black people are idiots"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/FdzTTAKmXVu6HrsTDTNOL7pNCSEtWHdkT3calJwTQhg=) Dear Peter, The Tennessee General Assembly adjourned this week after Speaker Casada's brief flirtation with attempted kidnapping and a full-throated defense of his racist chief-of-staff. **TENNESSEE 'S GLEN CASADA'S TOP STAFFER TRIES TO FRAME AN ACTIVIST, CALLS BLACK MAN A 'THUG NI**ER.' ** On Thursday morning, Newschannel 9's Phil Williams broke the story that Tennessee House Speaker Glen Casada's Chief-of-Staff Cade Cothren had forged an email in someone else's name in an attempt to have a young black activist thrown in jail. The story also revealed text message transcripts in which Cothren used blatantly racist rhetoric, calling a black NFL Quarterback a "thug ni**er," and stating that "black people are idiots." It gets worse -- one text exchange between Cothren and Speaker Casada himself shows Cothren using a racist meme to refer to black campaign volunteers. What does Casada do? Nothing. Way to have the back of Tennesseans, Glen. Read the full story [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/R0TBYBQOUs1FZRr7LsW9KuzsCveqJjNZFJF5MG8FTiI=). What does it say about Casada's leadership and judgement that he hired someone like Cade Cothren as his chief-of-staff? Text message transcripts make it clear that Casada was well-aware of Cothren's racist behavior last year, if he didn't in truth know sooner. Even after Cothren's racist comments and after he conspired to have a black activist jailed by forging an email, Casada has yet to fire him or even denounce his behavior, which he should've done the minute his actions came to light. Casada must, at the very least, fire Cothren and condemn his racist and criminal behavior if we are to have any hope that the GOP leadership in this state truly respects all the people who live in Tennessee. Casada's failure to act is just more proof that he looks at his office as a perch from which to tear apart the people of our state. It is clear he is a failure as a leader, an enabler of racists and sexual abusers and and that the people of Tennessee cannot trust him as House Speaker. **CHATTANOOGA VOLKSWAGEN WORKERS SEEK TO UNIONIZE - WWJD?** Last month, the 1,709 hourly employees at Volkswagen's Chattanooga plant launched a bid to join the United Auto Workers labor union. Gov. Bill Lee stopped by the plant on Monday for a captive audience speech, in which he demeaningly told the workers that the workplace operates best when workers give up their bargaining power and the ability to stand up for each other. He went on to say "the Lord has given up great things" \-- suggesting that God entrusts corporate executives with labor-management matters, and that the workers should too. "That's been the playbook for the Republican Party for decades now, to demonize labor and make labor appear to be the enemy. He was invoking God in this meeting that was basically a captive audience. It was something they were told they had to attend," [TNDP Chair Mary Mancini told the Memphis Commercial appeal](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/H1KXMdoWM5sLzMijtvplw2-f4qFq_0ZAE3RrSSVU2Lg=). "It's unfortunate he has to go there specifically to tell workers they can't stand up for themselves.'' A full audio recording of Lee's speech can be found [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/bvbKYX2N6BLCrl4upMR1-PAC7_XiqbsaOck51x0K8JY=). **DEMOCRATS FIGHTING FOR YOUR HEALTHCARE ARE HELD HOSTAGE** On Thursday evening, the final night of the 2019 legislative session, Democrats in the House decided to walk out of the House Chamber to protest the removal of Democratic representative Yusuf Hakeem from the conference committee that was considering Republicans' Medicaid block grant measure. In response to the protest, Glen Casada ordered the House Sargent-at-Arms to lock the doors and block any Democrats from leaving, which resulted in an altercation between personal security guard and State Rep. GA Hardaway, who was trying to leave the House floor. From the [Commercial Appeal](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/RxLSrDQY8LzVrTLIr6h4Ajh3_nl5DFZ4jhoWg06vEJk=): "Rep. GA Hardaway blamed the Republican leadership under Casada for allowing a chaotic atmosphere to develop. 'If you got that much confusion going on, then it means that those in power aren't conducting business in an orderly fashion.'" Full story [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/Putop0UOPdYsNMgS_WRFrYVSj06QCWcr1uAlMkUYVUM=). **CALL TO ACTION: HARMFUL BILL THAT CUTS MEDICAID ON GOVERNOR BILL LEE 'S DESK** We received this email alert from the Tennessee Justice Center: "On the last day of legislative session, the General Assembly passed a harmful bill to cut Medicaid through a so-called "block grant." The Medicaid block grant bill is now heading to Gov. Lee's desk. Now is the time to call Gov. Lee and tell him that you OPPOSE cutting Medicaid through a block grant. [Click here to call Gov. Lee!](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/4M0IX5aGSL7kvtj8cmTvA7WQemc9dkPizT1imTQ2l0o=?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMi8xLzY0MTg0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3ODQyYWIxLWMyNmQtZTkxMS1iNDllLTI4MTg3ODM5MWVmYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAibWFyeUB0bmRwLm9yZyINCn0%3D&hmac=nrsai-uqvKzhfgv3UZVZqccL9InQgqFe0UvulEyNkNQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/SL3UtzFFrbBE4wSXAuBMO-b6hritiV6BsraLFRe4TBs=?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMi8xLzY0MTg0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3ODQyYWIxLWMyNmQtZTkxMS1iNDllLTI4MTg3ODM5MWVmYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAibWFyeUB0bmRwLm9yZyINCn0%3D&hmac=nrsai-uqvKzhfgv3UZVZqccL9InQgqFe0UvulEyNkNQ=) "Medicaid block grants are part of the Trump administration's efforts to cut the healthcare of hard-working Americans. On Wednesday, [the Trump administration filed a formal request](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/8M2CBx8fskoYYJuGWmXvoE9HUTHcYaf9QZX2nGbmXMA=?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMi8xLzY0MTg0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3ODQyYWIxLWMyNmQtZTkxMS1iNDllLTI4MTg3ODM5MWVmYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAibWFyeUB0bmRwLm9yZyINCn0%3D&hmac=nrsai-uqvKzhfgv3UZVZqccL9InQgqFe0UvulEyNkNQ=) to strike down the entire Affordable Care Act, and the administration has been pushing states to apply for a Medicaid block grant as a way to gut the Medicaid program. Tennessee is the only state in the nation to voluntary take this irresponsible step. Governor Lee has 10 days to sign or reject the bill to cut Medicaid through a block grant. If he vetoes the bill, his veto will stand because the legislature has already adjourned. [Call Gov. Lee and tell him to veto the harmful Medicaid block grant bill!](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/4M0IX5aGSL7kvtj8cmTvA7WQemc9dkPizT1imTQ2l0o=?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMi8xLzY0MTg0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3ODQyYWIxLWMyNmQtZTkxMS1iNDllLTI4MTg3ODM5MWVmYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAibWFyeUB0bmRwLm9yZyINCn0%3D&hmac=nrsai-uqvKzhfgv3UZVZqccL9InQgqFe0UvulEyNkNQ=)" **TNDP ELEVATE SUMMIT, MAY 17 - 19, 2019, MURFREESBORO, TN** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/ZMQiTW1S0vxu4RuES9XceT8xh-X7kWLHr3Zi4nYWRSI=)** The TNDP Elevate Summit, scheduled for May 17 - 19 on the MTSU Campus, is a weekend of workshops, meetings, speakers, planning, and networking designed to elevate Tennessee Democrats and the values that we share. This will be an opportunity to meet, learn with, and learn from, Democrats and Democratic allies from across the state. Presidential candidate Julian Castro will be our wrap up speaker on Sunday afternoon. The four training tracts are Organizing and Outreach, Organizational Management, Communications, & Advocacy. Examples of training sessions: Working with Allied Organizations/Coalition Building, Grassroots Organizing & Base Building (Includes precinct-based organizing and volunteer recruitment), County Party Roles & Resources, Leadership Development & Healthy Organizational Building, Digital Media Strategy, Values-based Messaging, Should You Run/1st Steps for Running, Allied Group Presentations (Labor, LGBTQ, Faith, Af Am). **Registration prices:** $50 Individual Summit Registration $85 Summit Givers Registration (1 registration for you and a donation to help offset costs for others) $35 Summit Young Democrats Registration (36 and under) $25 Summit Low Cost Registration (If the full price registration is out of reach) **Register:[tndp.org/summit](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/yfKELwx5yIdts8z7dImYflCwYsPugr9iWfcUDh4jxgc=)** **Sponsorships: (Sponsorships help offset cost for registration assistance, travels costs for speakers/presenters, facility rental and food/drink):** $100 Summit Givers Sponsorship - no registration tickets included $250 Foothills Sponsor - 2 registrations included $500 Lookout Sponsor - 2 registrations included $1000 Highlands Sponsor - 2 registrations included $5000 Pinnacle sponsor - 2 registrations included **Sponsor:[tndp.org/summit](https://act.myngp.com/el/pCxFMTBICXnzb8Zu1YlJJABz2t6jm7RZyy_YS_nP_2s=/yfKELwx5yIdts8z7dImYflCwYsPugr9iWfcUDh4jxgc=)** **HELP US AMPLIFY OUR MESSAGE** We can always use the help of dedicated Democrats like you to help us amplify our message. clean_body: | | = Dear Peter, The Tennessee General Assembly adjourned this week after Speaker Casada's brief flirtation with attempted kidnapping and a full-throated defense of his racist chief-of-staff. TENNESSEE 'S GLEN CASADA'S TOP STAFFER TRIES TO FRAME AN ACTIVIST, CALLS BLACK MAN A 'THUG NIER.' On Thursday morning, Newschannel 9's Phil Williams broke the story that Tennessee House Speaker Glen Casada's Chief-of-Staff Cade Cothren had forged an email in someone else's name in an attempt to have a young black activist thrown in jail. The story also revealed text message transcripts in which Cothren used blatantly racist rhetoric, calling a black NFL Quarterback a "thug nier," and stating that "black people are idiots." It gets worse -- one text exchange between Cothren and Speaker Casada himself shows Cothren using a racist meme to refer to black campaign volunteers. What does Casada do? Nothing. Way to have the back of Tennesseans, Glen. Read the full story =. What does it say about Casada's leadership and judgement that he hired someone like Cade Cothren as his chief-of-staff? Text message transcripts make it clear that Casada was well-aware of Cothren's racist behavior last year, if he didn't in truth know sooner. Even after Cothren's racist comments and after he conspired to have a black activist jailed by forging an email, Casada has yet to fire him or even denounce his behavior, which he should've done the minute his actions came to light. Casada must, at the very least, fire Cothren and condemn his racist and criminal behavior if we are to have any hope that the GOP leadership in this state truly respects all the people who live in Tennessee. Casada's failure to act is just more proof that he looks at his office as a perch from which to tear apart the people of our state. It is clear he is a failure as a leader, an enabler of racists and sexual abusers and and that the people of Tennessee cannot trust him as House Speaker. CHATTANOOGA VOLKSWAGEN WORKERS SEEK TO UNIONIZE - WWJD? Last month, the 1,709 hourly employees at Volkswagen's Chattanooga plant launched a bid to join the United Auto Workers labor union. Gov. Bill Lee stopped by the plant on Monday for a captive audience speech, in which he demeaningly told the workers that the workplace operates best when workers give up their bargaining power and the ability to stand up for each other. He went on to say "the Lord has given up great things" \-- suggesting that God entrusts corporate executives with labor-management matters, and that the workers should too. "That's been the playbook for the Republican Party for decades now, to demonize labor and make labor appear to be the enemy. He was invoking God in this meeting that was basically a captive audience. It was something they were told they had to attend," =. "It's unfortunate he has to go there specifically to tell workers they can't stand up for themselves.'' A full audio recording of Lee's speech can be found =. DEMOCRATS FIGHTING FOR YOUR HEALTHCARE ARE HELD HOSTAGE On Thursday evening, the final night of the 2019 legislative session, Democrats in the House decided to walk out of the House Chamber to protest the removal of Democratic representative Yusuf Hakeem from the conference committee that was considering Republicans' Medicaid block grant measure. In response to the protest, Glen Casada ordered the House Sargent-at-Arms to lock the doors and block any Democrats from leaving, which resulted in an altercation between personal security guard and State Rep. GA Hardaway, who was trying to leave the House floor. From the =: "Rep. GA Hardaway blamed the Republican leadership under Casada for allowing a chaotic atmosphere to develop. 'If you got that much confusion going on, then it means that those in power aren't conducting business in an orderly fashion.'" Full story =. The Medicaid block grant bill is now heading to Gov. Lee's desk. Now is the time to call Gov. Lee and tell him that you OPPOSE cutting Medicaid through a block grant. = = "Medicaid block grants are part of the Trump administration's efforts to cut the healthcare of hard-working Americans. Tennessee is the only state in the nation to voluntary take this irresponsible step. Governor Lee has 10 days to sign or reject the bill to cut Medicaid through a block grant. And her stories of combatting voter suppression in Georgia were an inspiration for what we are facing in Texas. Many of you know that I’ve made voting rights a centerpiece of my campaign for Congress. Last year we made national news standing up for the students of Prairie View A&M, who were facing impediments to voting. And again this year, we are fighting a Secretary of State who attempted to purge 95,000 naturalized citizens from the voter rolls. I need to count on you as we build a winning campaign in TX-10. **[Donate $20 today and we will continue this critical work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/6520880/59597713/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDU5ZDVjNi04ZjZlLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=peHxnI_QrwpOjFA4bz7lRYD9L73hwNZs6_lR-A5z6O8=&refcode=em050419&amount=20&recurring=1)** As Stacey explained, she refused to “concede” after the 2018 Georgia governor’s race given the pervasive evidence of voter suppression. ---
It's been an exciting first week of campaigning! We wanted to share with you some pictures we took out on the trail.

It's truly representative of this campaign and what Joe has always stood for: **Championing the American worker.** [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b5c/1cd0ac28/32abcaf4/356bf0cb/2703670932/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190504pics-b1_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190504pics&utm_content=b1_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1") Then, Joe headed to Iowa where he spread his message about the importance of rebuilding the middle class so that the doors of opportunity are open to all Americans, no matter their race, their gender, or who they love, no matter who they are or where they live or whether they have a disability. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The war on our health care wages on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
First, let me share a quick story with you. Then, help me take action.
| | Peter,

Many of you know the story of my campaign -- some of you better than others. It all goes back to two years ago today, the day House Republicans passed the American Health Care Act.

**On May 4, 2017, after years of failed attempts, Congressional Republicans voted to completely dismantle the Affordable Care Act (ACA) and rip away protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions.** As I watched our nation's leaders celebrate a bill designed to strip millions of their access to health care rather than focus on making our health care system stronger, it became clear to me that _someone_ had to take action.

I knew that I could no longer sit on the sidelines or let my apprehension stand in my way. How could I when blatant efforts to price families out of their insurance plans were happening right before my eyes? **It was that day that I made the decision to run for Congress. And Peter, you know what comes next.**

We won our first battle in November when we voted out politicians here in VA-07, and across the country, who put special interests above everyday Americans and who put scoring political points above solving problems. But the war on our health care wages on -- and it's going to take action from all of us if we want to put an end to attacks on affordable coverage once and for all. [**So Peter, will you sign my petition telling Washington to stop playing politics with our health care? We need to raise our voices loud and clear if we want to ensure our friends, families, and neighbors can afford the coverage they need. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Axp1PVLSuHcEoX-l5wB7tHJZqR3bvZCO_KhOIihsqCg=/kXWNKtuHEDCyILCvbsIQeIJrAlGJyEo72xEmMpF3gsg=) | [PROTECT HEALTH CARE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Axp1PVLSuHcEoX-l5wB7tHJZqR3bvZCO_KhOIihsqCg=/kXWNKtuHEDCyILCvbsIQeIJrAlGJyEo72xEmMpF3gsg=)
---
I greatly appreciate your support on an issue that affects each and every one of us.

Thanks,
Abigail
[SIGN IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Axp1PVLSuHcEoX-l5wB7tHJZqR3bvZCO_KhOIihsqCg=/kXWNKtuHEDCyILCvbsIQeIJrAlGJyEo72xEmMpF3gsg=)
---

She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Axp1PVLSuHcEoX-l5wB7tHJZqR3bvZCO_KhOIihsqCg=/2VQiqTR3Gp4VvhLEZkcFs746Tqe8XMk319sYnvYRtQM=)

subject: Resolute Reads
body:
The U.S. added 263,000 new hires in April, easily beating Wall Street expectations of 190,000. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d358e64f68&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Jobs Surge in April, Unemployment Rate Falls to the Lowest Since 1969](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b237740e2f&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“The U.S. jobs machine kept humming along in April, adding a robust 263,000 new hires while the unemployment rate fell to 3.6%, the lowest in a generation, the Labor Department reported Friday,” Jeff Cox writes. The American economy “easily beat Wall Street expectations of 190,000 and a 3.8% jobless rate.”

**Behind the numbers:** [Unemployment rate falls to lowest in nearly 50 years](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=126f6aaf6f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [CNN Poll: Trump's Approval Rating on the Economy Hits a New High](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17bc079444&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
“President Donald Trump hits a new high on his economic approval ratings in a new CNN Poll conducted by SSRS, reaching 56% of Americans saying he's doing a good job on the economy,” Grace Sparks reports. “At the same time, Trump's favorability rating has hit its highest point since the 100-day mark of his presidency.”
---
|
---
| [Don’t Call it a Coup. Venezuelans Have a Right to Replace an Oppressive, Toxic Regime.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf7f780a7a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“Tuesday’s uprising is not a ‘coup attempt,’ as the Maduro regime, echoed by too many people abroad, calls it. Rather, it is the latest in a series of legitimate and, for the most part, nonviolent efforts by Venezuelans, both civilian and military, to throw off an oppressive, toxic regime so that they can freely elect a legitimate government,” _The Washington Post_ editorial board writes. “Supporters of freedom and democracy should stand in solidarity with Mr. Guaidó and the many thousands of Venezuelans now bravely asserting their rights.”

🎬 **Watch:** [A message to all the patriotic citizens of Venezuela](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9bb572daff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [A Real Attorney General](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a015212f8e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Washington pile-ons are never pretty, but this week’s political setup of Attorney General William Barr is disreputable even by Beltway standards,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes. “Democrats and the media are turning the AG into a villain for doing his duty and making the hard decisions that special counsel Robert Mueller abdicated . . . This trashing of Bill Barr shows how frustrated and angry Democrats continue to be that the special counsel came up empty in his Russia collusion probe.”
---
|
---
| [White House Unveils Rule to Protect Health Workers’ Religious, Moral Beliefs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47c7fd7bc0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The Trump administration will expand enforcement of protections for medical workers with moral or faith-based objections to medical procedures such as abortion,” Stephanie Armour reports. “The rule is needed, supporters say, because many health-care providers have long felt they have had to violate their beliefs and often lack the ability to bring legal action on their own.”

**Watch:** [The President and First Lady take part in a National Day of Prayer](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0daf9b43b9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [The Incredibly Dumb Bill Barr Scandal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a463eb52e5&e=3ee4985eea)
-_National Review_
“What is perhaps most notable about this episode is that Robert Mueller — or, perhaps, as Barr hinted in his Wednesday testimony, people around him — were concerned about the media coverage and political discussion around his report. Particularly troubling was that it wasn’t damning enough of the president. This is not a prosecutorial concern, but a political one unworthy of people who were invested with incredible investigative power in the name of objectivity,” the _National Review_ editorial board writes. “Bill Barr’s critics are demonstrating their lack of judgment and seriousness, not his.”
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump: Empowered Women Pave the Way to Economic Progress](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd8533d393&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
“I recently traveled to Africa to advance the White House's Women's Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, or W-GDP, which seeks to reach 50 million women in the developing world by 2025,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes. “We will work to achieve this goal by supporting women in the workplace, helping them succeed as entrepreneurs, and by advancing legal reforms that will create greater gender equality.”
---
|
---
| [U.S. Steel to Spend $1 Billion on Mon Valley Works](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4656b46cd8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_
U.S. Steel announced plans this week “that it will spend $1 billion to upgrade its Mon Valley Works, a move the company says will keep the region’s last integrated steel mill operating for decades to come,” Daniel Moore reports. “The company will build a combined casting and rolling facility — the first of its kind at any American steel mill — and a cogeneration power plant. Put together, the combination aims to reduce emissions and increase the efficiency and sustainability of steelmaking in the Mon Valley.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d7d258473&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20b4145d73&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e0d2f5817b)
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I can’t overstate how grateful I am for supporters like you, stepping up when it matters most and fighting by my side. I know we’ve faced a lot of tough battles together -- from fighting back against Republican attempts to gut our health care to Trump’s shameful government shutdown to inhumane immigration policies. But we’ve had a lot of wins, too. We launched our campaign a little over 100 days ago. Since then we’ve announced bold plans to finally take on our country’s gun violence epidemic, raise teacher pay, lift up middle-class families, and much more. **And we were able to do this because of you.** **You’re a crucial member of this team and your voice is important. I want to make sure we’re running a campaign you can be proud of. That’s why I’m personally asking:** **[Will you take two minutes (I promise!) to share your thoughts on 2020 and the long road ahead?](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-petition-190503-may-survey?refcode=ema190504-full&source=ema190504-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=4649%2E5755789%2E7q-INY)** I want to make sure I’m fighting for you to the best of my ability. I’ll be sitting down with my team to go over our plans for the coming months and your answers to this survey will help us set our agenda. Thanks for all you do, — Kamala Harris

---

| | **This is a long email. But it 's so important. I hope you'll take a minute to read it -- [_and please consider giving $15 to keep our campaign going. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd72/3eb3e2fc/4db7b21a/7449a3ef/1552742404/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190504_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")** I was never supposed to be a frontrunner in this presidential race. I was never supposed to make the cut for the debate stage. People who grew up where I did... Who were raised by single moms like I was... Who come from a family of immigrants like I do... We were told to set our sights lower. **But you just helped me make history and prove them all wrong.** Because of you, our campaign just skyrocketed to become one of the select few that's going to be on that Democratic debate stage. **Now, we 're entering the next phase of this campaign.** In the coming days I'll be talking to voters across the country. I'll be sharing my inclusive vision for America -- a vision that is a stark contrast from President Trump's. I'll be honest: It's going to take a lot more work to keep this campaign going. I'm going to need you with me to power us so we can get our message out. [_**Can I count on you to rush in $15 and become one of my first post-debate donors before midnight? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd72/3eb3e2fc/4db7b21a/7449a3ef/1552742404/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190504_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Before I sign off, I need to say one last thing. It's important. I've asked you for so much, and you've answered the call every time. When the establishment said I was a longshot... When the press didn't give me a fair shot... When the far-right said no one like me could ever be President... **You believed in me, and you had my back. You have no idea how much that means. ** I can't thank you enough for all you've done for our movement. Julian [**CONTRIBUTE >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd72/3eb3e2fc/4db7b21a/7449a3ef/1552742404/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190504_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")

clean_body: | | | | | "" | | This is a long email. But it 's so important. I hope you'll take a minute to read it -- "" I was never supposed to be a frontrunner in this presidential race. I was never supposed to make the cut for the debate stage. People who grew up where I did... Who were raised by single moms like I was... Who come from a family of immigrants like I do... We were told to set our sights lower. But you just helped me make history and prove them all wrong. Because of you, our campaign just skyrocketed to become one of the select few that's going to be on that Democratic debate stage. Now, we 're entering the next phase of this campaign. In the coming days I'll be talking to voters across the country. I'll be sharing my inclusive vision for America -- a vision that is a stark contrast from President Trump's. I'll be honest: It's going to take a lot more work to keep this campaign going. I'm going to need you with me to power us so we can get our message out. "" Before I sign off, I need to say one last thing. It's important. I've asked you for so much, and you've answered the call every time. When the establishment said I was a longshot... When the press didn't give me a fair shot... When the far-right said no one like me could ever be President... You believed in me, and you had my back. You have no idea how much that means. I can't thank you enough for all you've done for our movement. Julian "" | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

name: Rich McDaniel
subject: Amazing news/tough choices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
The level of grassroots donations we get from emails like these helps decide which states we can organize in and how much we can invest. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ff68/45c30650/833d27c0/66960d60/8251083/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
As Elizabeth's National Organizing Director, I get to hear amazing news every day.

More people are coming to our events, signing up to volunteer, hosting house parties, and having the person-to-person conversations that change minds and build movements.

But I also face some tough choices with our budget.

We'd love to be able to invest everywhere, all the time. But it's not always possible.

**We need to keep raising enough money to grow our movement and harness the incredible energy out there for Elizabeth.**

**[So I have to ask: Can you support Elizabeth and our grassroots team by chipping in $3 or whatever you can afford today?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ff68/45c30650/833d27c0/66960d63/8251083/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTA0ZW0yLWZ1bGwtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190504em2-full-a")**

Elizabeth always talks about it how it takes grassroots movements to make big, structural change.

So we're putting our money where our mouth is.

We've already made big investments in _people_ -- over half of our staff is on the ground in the early primary and caucus states.

And we invested _early_. Some people outside the campaign think it's a risky strategy to spend money on grassroots organizing so soon.

But we know that we can't just show up and ask for people's support at the last second before an election.

We need to _earn_ support, keep our ears on the ground, and be active in communities that don't always get attention from politicians when it's not an election year.

And in a crowded Democratic primary, with so many candidates and so much noise, you know what will actually break through?

Face-to-face conversations. Word of mouth.

I'm so proud of everyone out there who's organizing their communities for Elizabeth. They'll make real change -- not just in one election cycle, but for years to come. Because this isn't just a campaign. It's a movement.

**But we can only keep investing in grassroots organizing if people like you keep making contributions to fund it. The level of grassroots donations we get from emails like these helps decide which states we can organize in and how much we can invest.

So here's that link one more time. If you're able to chip in today, please know that your donation will make a real difference:**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/may-fundraising](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ff68/45c30650/833d27c0/66960d62/8251083/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiMjAxOTA1MDRlbTItZnVsbC1hIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/may-fundraising?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190504em2-full-a")**

With gratitude,

Rich

National Organizing Director
